Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BURCH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Stephen Sommers (434.4500) for plaintiff and moving party. No other appearances. Mr. Sommers presented a timely proof of service to the court and the court granted the motion as unopposed. Plaintiff's request for sanctions was denied. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Continued To Jan-04-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Set For Trial On Dec-13-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-24-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 624

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BURCH DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS' JOINT ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
